Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(4 comments)

I think adding batched RPC handling is very useful, but I'm a bit worried that this patch is touching so many files that it may be difficult to land due to conflicts. 

If that becomes a problem preventing the patch from landing, it would make sense to split this patch into several parts:
- add the low-level "pill" functions with wrappers that match existing functions that pass req->rq_pill with spelling.txt to warn about old usage
- separate patches that affect a limited area of code (eg. llite)
- final patch to remove compat functions (maybe landed a few months after other conversion is finished)
